step_rationale: Amino acid AMI biomarker; ischemic stress marker not direct pathway molecule.
mechanism: Tyrosine dysmetabolism reflects systemic ischemic stress and myocardial metabolic dysfunction during acute MI.

references.title: Improved Risk Prediction of Acute Myocardial Infarction in Patients With Stable Coronary Artery Disease Using an Amino Acid-Assisted Model.
NMR plasma metabolomics study of patients overcoming acute myocardial infarction: in the first 12 h after onset of chest pain with statistical discrimination towards metabolomic biomarkers.
